title: WIHP Isixhobo Sokubiza Esingenamda
subtitle: Bhala naliphi na igama → Fumana i-IPA ku-Wiktionary → Guqulela ku-Hangul!
inputPlaceholder: Bhala naliphi na igama (umzekelo: Molo, Ndiyakuthanda...)
step2c: • Iyonke iilwimi ezili-117 nenkxaso ye-IPA engama-100%!
canConvert: Unokuguqula amagama avela kwiilwimi ezili-117 zehlabathi, kubandakanya iilwimi zaseIndiya ezingaphezu kwama-20!
philosophy: Amagama akufanelanga abe nemida. I-WIHP ibulela i-Wiktionary IPA.
